name: logistics carriers managing 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 10-50 vehicles, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance schedules causes unexpected breakdowns. We automate fleet management and maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and paper logs.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance schedules leads to unexpected breakdowns.
features: manual entry for vehicle maintenance records
